SELECT value, log1p(value) AS log_value FROM test_log1p WHERE value > 0;
SELECT log1p(-0.5) AS log_negative FROM test_log1p;
SELECT log1p(x) FROM (SELECT value AS x FROM test_log1p WHERE value > -1);
CREATE TABLE test_log1p_2 (id Int32, value Float64);
SELECT a.id, log1p(b.value) FROM test_log1p_2 AS b JOIN test_log1p AS a ON b.value > a.value;
SELECT log1p((SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_log1p) + 1) AS max_log_value;
